perf.regime: One program per batch row: coalesced read of V probs, TOPK-unrolled iterative argmax top-k selection (descending prob, ties by ascending vocab id -- same pattern as topk_softmax_kernel), renormalize the kept set, then tl.cumsum + argmax-over-(cdf>u) inverse-CDF sample. TOPK + BLOCK_V=next_pow2(V) are tl.constexpr. Fuses top-k mask + renorm + sample into one launch. num_warps=4.

notes: Deterministic given (probs, uniform_samples, top_k). The top-k selection reuses topk_softmax_kernel's iterative-argmax pattern (tl.argmax lowest-index-on-ties == the reference's stable descending argsort, so the kept set matches element-wise). TOPK + BLOCK_V are tl.constexpr derived from dispatch args (cached) -- NOT user specialization_knobs. Portable; AMD gfx942 is the port-across-arch follow-up. Scalar top_k only (per-row tensor top_k breaks the TOPK constexpr unroll); production 100k+ vocab needs a staged scan (follow-up).
